metadata.panel_name: Per-variant allele frequencies in karyotype groups
metadata.notes: DEMO variant_afs.json. The atlas reads this and computes private_score = AF_INV - AF_STD; dosage_score = 1 - |AF_HET - 0.5|*2; final_score = private_score + dosage_score. Variants are assigned tiers automatically: AF_STD<=0.02 + AF_HET in [0.25,0.75] + AF_INV>=0.80 = Tier 1; AF_STD<=0.05 + AF_INV>=0.70 = Tier 2; otherwise Tier 4. Indels with size in [20,300] bp are flagged gel-visible. Replace with real variants from your VCF subset to inversion intervals.

CAND_LG28_subtelo.comment: clean Tier 1: STD=0.01 / HET=0.48 / INV=0.96; gel-visible 60bp indel
Tier 1 dosage but indel too small for cheap gel (4bp)
Tier 2 strong tag with imperfect dosage

CAND_LG07_mid.comment: Tier 2: AF_STD just above Tier 1 threshold; KASP-style assay

CAND_LG15_distal.comment: Tier 4 noise: AF_STD too high, AF_INV too low
